notes.en: Early-harvest variety — harvest in 2 months from transplanting. Fruit weight ~85 g, yield ~3.5 kg/plant. Bacterial-wilt resistant.

traits.quote: Thilina is a variety where one fruit weighs around 85g, harvests in 2 months, and from one plant you can get a harvest of 3 1/2 kg. It is also resistant to Bacteria Wilt.
